programmes.show_description: ...Victims Unit. As Carisi begins the long-anticipated trial of Sir Toby Moore, the SVU faces setbacks in several other cases.
Crime drama series. The SVU joins forces with an undercover taskforce to take down a human trafficking ring.
Rollins sets out undercover to pursue a suspect who administers drugs to tourists and assaults them, while Benson helps the victims resolve their memories.
Danny and Baez investigate a homicide reported by Maggie, the medium who previously helped them solve a case. Frank tries to help ex-partner Lenny when his daughter gets arrested.
Frank and Erin are at odds when Frank learns the DA's office keeps a list of officers they consider unreliable. Danny and Baez recruit a retired mobster to assist in an investigation.
A soft-spoken cyclist finds a way to shock deputies. A family man remorsefully agrees with police that his COVID-19 fears led him to make a mistake.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Murder 2.0: A serial killer who posts footage of his crimes online engages Gibbs and the team in a murderous game of cat and mouse.
Collateral Damage: A robbery at Quantico base leaves a guard dead. As the agents investigate, they realise that cash may not have been the robbers' objective.
Cloak: Gibbs sets his team the task of infiltrating a secure navy facility to steal a classified military file.
Deep Vote: A murder victim who was killed in a case of mistaken identity is linked to the recent election of a state senator.
Who Let The Dogs Out: Crime drama. Detectives are called to the scene of a fatal attack on a woman by a pit-bull and must track down the dog and its owner before someone else is hurt.
A shoe-shine man is stabbed to death. Was the victim the Vietnam war hero he claimed to be?
Crime drama series. When a young psychologist is found stabbed to death, Briscoe and Green believe the apparent mugging may be linked to files on her computer.
Born Again: Crime drama series. When a girl is found dead from suffocation in Central Park, Briscoe and Green find that her adoptive mother may inadvertently be responsible.
When a teenager is found dead, Briscoe and Green suspect that her death is linked to a website run by a group of popular boys at her school.
Toxic: US drama. The death of a marine unearths a top-secret military research programme. Meanwhile, Abby is called away to assist with an ongoing medical project.
Legend - Part 1: US drama. The murder of a Marine brings the team into contact with the Office of Special Projects in LA. Tony becomes concerned about Ziva's behaviour.
Legend - Part 2: Crime drama. Gibbs and McGee work with the NCIS Office of Special Projects (OSP) to track down a terrorist cell in LA. The agents question Ziva's loyalties.
A pipe bomb explodes in a brownstone, and Shaw and Riley must identify the intended target: a controversial author or a fertility doctor.
When the squad tries to solve an assault in Central Park, they are hampered by their own blind spots and a community that is losing trust in the police.
Rollins and Kat respond to a dangerous domestic violence call while Fin gives his deposition in the lawsuit against him.
A fellow detective asks the SVU for help when he suspects his two daughters are being groomed by a serial predator; Kat disobeys the captain's orders.
A desperate father decides to take matters into his own hands in the case against his daughter's attacker.
Hi-tech crime drama series. Finch tries to revive the Machine. Root fights for her life against an onslaught of Samaritan agents. Fusco is questioned about Elias and Dominic's deaths.
Reese and Finch reboot the Machine, but glitches cause the software to malfunction. Identifying Reese as a threat, it sends an assassin after him.
The owner of a truck discovers what happens when you don't lock your door. Police level with a troubled man and implore him to make better choices.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Dagger: Gibbs forms an uneasy alliance with Agent Lee in order to catch the man who has kidnapped her daughter.
Road Kill: US crime drama series. The suspicious death of a petty officer leads the agents to an underground street-fighting organisation and a zealous neighbourhood-watch group.
Silent Night: US crime drama series. A former petty officer thought to have been dead for 17 years is implicated in a double homicide.
A murder which appears to be mob-related proves more complicated than first thought.
A double homicide is linked to blood diamonds used to fund the Sierra Leonean civil war.
The sole remaining resident of an upper West Side apartment building is found murdered.
Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an investment analyst who sold shares in a bankrupt company.
Briscoe and Green investigate the possibility that a student has been stabbed in order to stop him exposing the poor health and safety practices. .
Briscoe and Green are knee-deep in suspects after a drug called dazzle is found in the body of a young woman who fell from the roof of her art studio.
Semper Fidelis: US crime drama series. Gibbs is tasked with investigating the murder of an ICE agent at the home of the secretary of the navy.
Aliyah: Drama series. Tony faces the consequences of his deadly encounter with Michael Rivkin. The agents fly to Israel to present Tony's case to the head of Mossad.
Truth or Consequences: Crime drama series involving Navy and Marine Corps personnel. As the team searches for Ziva's replacement, the past still weighs heavily on everybody's minds.
The kidnapping of a father and daughter leads an old enemy of the BAU back to Dr Reid, with a very specific request for him.
The squad interrogates a group of college roommates when one of them disappears during COVID-19 lock-down.
